steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The researcher claims some lakes increased in ice duration—opposite to the general trend of decline. The example must show a lake with more ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: B identifies Lake Baikal as having more ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81, directly demonstrating the researcher's claim of increased duration. The other choices either cite lakes that did not increase based on the graph or use isolated single-period values rather than demonstrating growth across time periods. This matches choice B — B is correct.
